name: Blueport Acquisition Ltd
summary: PART I Introduction Blueport Acquisition Ltd (the Company) is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company on January 13, 2025. The Company was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities (Business Combination).
